## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Rimkus' forensics services and capabilities to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Forensics is Rimkus' original core business, focused on investigating causes of failures/accidents across many industries](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Wide range of specialized experts (e.g. engineers, biomechanists, toxicologists) provide analysis for insurance, legal, and corporate clients](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Priority is growing overall forensics work in key regions rather than specific service areas](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Potential to create region-specific content (e.g. calculators) to drive SEO and leads in target markets](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

## Topics

### Forensics Overview

  - [Started in 1983 with structural/civil engineering for property loss consulting](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Expanded to wide range of investigative services to determine causes of failures/accidents](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Key clients: Insurance firms, law firms, government entities, corporations](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Not typically serving individual homeowners, focused on larger/sophisticated claims](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Can involve multiple practice areas collaborating on a single case](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### Key Practice Areas

  - [Property Loss Consulting: Structural/civil engineering to assess building damage](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Construction Claims & Disputes: Project delays, worksite accidents, materials issues](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Premises Liability & Security: Slip-and-fall cases, event security, crowd control](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Transportation: Vehicle accidents, logistics, commercial trucking](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Fire & Explosion: Origin and cause investigations](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Biomechanics/Human Factors: Injury analysis, human behavior in accidents](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Digital Forensics: Data recovery from vehicles, phones, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Materials Testing: Lab analysis of failed components](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2974.0)
  - [Environmental: Contamination, chemical spills, site cleanup](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=3162.0)
  - [Meteorology: Weather analysis to support other investigations](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=3241.0)

### Specialized Capabilities

  - [In-house labs for materials testing and medical device usability studies](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=2976.0)
  - [Proprietary weather app for historical data](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=3253.0)
  - [Visual media team for enhanced video/audio and 3D animations](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Legal nurse consultants to review medical records](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)

### Growth Strategy

  - [Focus on increasing work in priority geographic regions vs. specific services](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [List of target regions and desired growth areas forthcoming](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=3345.0)
  - [Two tiers of experts to potentially highlight:](https://fathom.video/share/sqzta5GK44QeSK2urasgy9MnaoM1oC4n?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
    1.  Established niche experts
    2.  Newer hires needing to build their Rimkus business
